title: Edit Log Row
description: A single entry in trips/{slug}/edit-log.json. Provenance for bounded writes to trip.yaml. Tracked in git per §5.10.

id.description: Stable identifier for the edit event. Used by revert.

target.description: Canonical file the patch applies to. Only trip.yaml in Phase 1.

intent.description: Natural-language intent that generated the patch, as produced by FloatingChat edit mode.

patch.description: RFC 6902 JSON Patch operations applied to the target.

inversePatch.description: Inverse patch that restores the target to its prior state. Revert applies this.

snapshotRef.description: Relative path to the pre-write snapshot, e.g. trips/{slug}/snapshots/trip.yaml-{id}.yaml.

actor.description: Surface that authored the edit. Phase 1 admits both for forward compatibility.

failureReason.description: Populated when status == 'failed'. Human-readable reason from the validator.
